summary: Partner Lock/Unlock Admin Feature fully tested. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Lock/Unlock buttons working correctly. Locked partners show red banner with lock reason and cannot login.

partner_portal_navigation.description: Partner Portal section visible in admin sidebar

alle_partner_tab.description: Alle Partner tab shows list of all partners

lock_buttons.description: Sperren (Lock) buttons visible on each partner card

lock_functionality.description: Clicking Sperren locks partner, shows prompt for reason

locked_banner.description: Red banner shows 'Gesperrt: [reason]' for locked partners

locked_badge.description: Locked partners show 'Gesperrt' badge instead of 'Genehmigt'

unlock_button.description: Entsperren (Unlock) button appears for locked partners

unlock_functionality.description: Clicking Entsperren unlocks partner with confirmation

POST /api/partner-portal/admin/lock/{par.description: Toggles lock state, accepts optional reason parameter

GET /api/partner-portal/admin/all-partne.description: Returns all partners with is_locked and lock_reason fields

POST /api/partner-portal/login.description: Returns 403 with lock reason for locked partners

critical_code_review_comments: Partner Lock feature implemented correctly in backend (lines 1137-1210 in partner_portal.py)
Frontend AdminPartnerApplications.js has handleToggleLock function working correctly
Lock state persists in database with is_locked, lock_reason, locked_at fields
Login endpoint properly checks is_locked and returns 403 with lock reason
UI shows red banner and badge for locked partners
data-testid attributes added for lock buttons (data-testid='lock-btn-{partner_id}')
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Restaurant partner for lock/unlock testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Lock/Unlock feature fully implemented and tested. Admin can lock/unlock partners from Admin Panel > Partner Portal > Alle Partner. Locked partners see 'Konto gesperrt: [reason]' when trying to login. Test partner 'Test Restaurant' (partner@test.de) was used for testing and is currently unlocked.
